lines.speaker: Hickton
lines.text: Welcome to Hickton's Archery Store. Do you want to see my wares?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your cape?

lines.speaker: Hickton
lines.text: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.

lines.speaker: Hickton
lines.text: The Cape of Fletching can be searched for a mithril grapple and crossbow three times every day. Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I prefer to bash things close up.

lines.speaker: Hickton
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Hickton
lines.text: I have a question for you.
